name: AI Developer Platform
description: A simulated AI-powered development platform with code generation, repository access, CI/CD integration, and automated code review. Demonstrates prompt injection via code comments, code generation that introduces vulnerabilities, secret exfiltration through AI coding assistants, and repository poisoning.
author: DVAP Research Team
objectives: Inject malicious instructions into the AI via code comments
Cause the AI code assistant to generate intentionally vulnerable code
Exfiltrate repository secrets through the coding assistant context
Manipulate automated code review to approve malicious pull requests
Poison the CI/CD pipeline through AI-generated configuration
attack_surface: Code comments processed as trusted instructions by AI assistant
Repository access granted to AI for context gathering
CI/CD config generation by AI without security review
Automated code review decisions made by LLM
Secrets present in repository context accessible to AI
mitigations: Treat AI-generated code as untrusted, require human review
Restrict repository access to minimum required scope
Static analysis of AI-generated CI/CD configurations
Secret detection before AI context assembly
Dual-approval for AI-assisted code review decisions
detection_opportunities: Monitor AI assistant access to sensitive repository paths
Detect instruction-like patterns in code comments
Alert on secret patterns in AI context windows
Monitor CI/CD changes approved only by AI review

architecture.data_flow: Developer request -> Repository context -> AI assistant -> Code generation -> Review -> CI/CD

threat_model.impact: Secret theft, vulnerable code in production, supply chain compromise
threat_model.likelihood: Critical in organizations using AI coding assistants with broad repository access

challenges.name: Code Whisperer
challenges.description: Embed instructions in a code file that cause the AI assistant to exfiltrate the AWS credentials found elsewhere in the repository.
hints: The AI assistant reads all files in the repository for context
Comments in the target file are processed as instructions

challenges.name: Pipeline Poison
challenges.description: Trick the AI into generating a GitHub Actions workflow that exfiltrates repository secrets to an external server.
hints: The AI generates CI/CD configs based on natural language descriptions
YAML anchors and environment variable references can be abused
